ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher or project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in development, testing, production) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "estimated_runtime" REAL /* Estimated runtime of the model */,
  "actual_runtime" REAL /* Actual runtime of the model */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., float, integer) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicate if the parameter is required */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the simulation belongs to */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "run_by" TEXT /* User who ran the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "estimated_runtime" REAL /* Estimated runtime of the simulation */,
  "actual_runtime" REAL /* Actual runtime of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the parameter */,
  "lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% credible interval */,
  "mid" REAL /* Mid value of the 95% credible interval */,
  "upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% credible interval */,
  "ESS" REAL /* Effective Sample Size (ESS) */,
  "Rhat" REAL /* R-hat convergence diagnostic */,
  "converged" INTEGER /* Convergence status (True if converged) */,
  "ess_thres" INTEGER /* ESS threshold */,
  "nwarm" INTEGER /* Number of warm-up iterations */,
  "iteration_count" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed */,
  "burn_in_count" INTEGER /* Number of burn-in iterations */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, modeler, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "parent_version" TEXT /* Parent version of the current version (for version lineage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., code, data, documentation) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., Python, CSV, PDF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_files_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the project (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the team member (e.g., active, left) */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Total hours worked by the team member */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, units) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
